# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "devvm"
  adminUsername:
    type: string
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_DS1_v2"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-publicip')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      publicIPAddressVersion: "IPv4"
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
      allocationMethod: "Dynamic"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: '2021-07-01'
    name: "[parameters('vmNamePrefix')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "Canonical"
          offer: "UbuntuServer"
          sku: "18.04-LTS"
          version: "latest"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-osdisk')]"
          caching: "ReadWrite"
          createOption: "FromImage"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic'))]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[parameters('vmNamePrefix')]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-publicip'))]"
